title: Get Temperature (Core) Summary by Interval
description:
This endpoint returns Temperature (Core) data for a date range. Temperature (Core) data applies specifically to data logged manually by the user on a given day. It only returns a value for dates on which the Fitbit device was able to record Temperature (Core) data and the maximum date range cannot exceed 30 days.

It uses units that correspond to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: start-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today.

parameters.name: end-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today. Maximum range: 30 days

response_fields.name: tempCore : dateTime
response_fields.description: The log timestamp specified in the format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.

response_fields.name: tempCore : value
response_fields.description: The temperature value in degrees Celsius or Fahrenheit depending on the country specified in the Accept-Language header.
